name: bunpro-mcp
description: Read Bunpro SRS data: user profile, study queue, deck settings, review statistics, JLPT progress, review forecasts, and grammar/vocabulary details.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Bunpro profile

tools.name: get_study_queue
tools.description: Get due grammar and vocabulary review counts

tools.name: get_decks
tools.description: Get study deck settings and progress

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get study statistics, streak, and badges

tools.name: get_jlpt_progress
tools.description: Get JLPT progress across all levels

tools.name: get_review_forecast
tools.description: Get upcoming review forecast (daily or hourly)

tools.name: get_review_activity
tools.description: Get daily review counts for the past month

tools.name: get_srs_details
tools.description: Get review items at a specific SRS level

tools.name: get_grammar_point
tools.description: Get grammar point details by ID

tools.name: get_vocab
tools.description: Get vocabulary details by slug or ID
